zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Meinell於大約1132年出生在英國德比夏爾柯克 明日香時，他的父親Gilbert de Meinell24歲，母親Daughter of Ralph FitzHubert25歲。他於大約1155年與Gertrude Asceline Fossard在英國越可爾爾頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1205年1月30日在英國越可爾斯托可斯利享年74歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Meinell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of South German Meixl or Meixel: from a pet form of any of various ancient Germanic personal names formed with mag- ‘strength’ or māg ‘kinsman’ as the first element.

variants.name: Meixsell
meanings: Variant of   Meixell  , a surname of German origin.

variants.name: Mikesell
meanings: History: Andreas Meixel or Meissel came to Lancaster County, PA, c. 1715from Leimen, Germany.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Meinell was born about 1132, in Kirk Langley, Derbyshire, England, his father, Gilbert de Meinell, was 24 and his mother, Daughter of Ralph FitzHubert, was 25. He married Gertrude Asceline Fossard about 1155, in Whorlton, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 30 January 1205, in Stokesley, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 74.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Meinell est né environ 1132, à Kirk Langley, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Gilbert de Meinell, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Daughter of Ralph FitzHubert, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Gertrude Asceline Fossard environ 1155, à Whorlton, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 30 janvier 1205, à Stokesley, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Meinell è nato il circa 1132 nel Kirk Langley, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Gilbert de Meinell, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Daughter of Ralph FitzHubert, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Gertrude Asceline Fossard circa 1155, nel Whorlton, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 30 gennaio 1205, nel Stokesley, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 74 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Meinellが約1132年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアキルク ラングリーで生まれた時，父Gilbert de Meinellは24歳，母Daughter of Ralph FitzHubertは25歳であった。約1155年にイギリスヨークシュアイアウオルルトンでGertrude Asceline Fossardと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1205年1月30日にイギリスヨークシュアイアストケスリーで74歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Meinell(이)가 대략 1132년 영국 더비실르 커크 랭글리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gilbert de Meinell(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Daughter of Ralph FitzHubert(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1155년 영국 요르크실르 화를턴에서 Gertrude Asceline Fossard(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1205년 1월 30일 영국 요르크실르 스토케슬리에서 74세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Meinell родился около 1132 г. в местности кирк лангли, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Gilbert de Meinell было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Daughter of Ralph FitzHubert, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Gertrude Asceline Fossard около 1155 г. в местности уаурлтон, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 30 января 1205 г. в местности стокесли, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 74 лет.
